column_map.further_action_administrative: What further action do you need to take to control risks? — Administrative controls
column_map.further_action_elimination: What further action do you need to take to control risks? — Elimination (physically remove the hazard)

column_map.further_action_substitution: What further action do you need to take to control risks? — Substitution (replace the hazard)
